All members go into a raffle on June 5th, so join before then to have a chance to win (link in bio) We’re also giving away a free month membership each week randomly to someone that retweets this post Today is a great internet day Announcing my NFT mint for the week (decided to wait until Blast NFTs were pumping/shining to an...

We’re still floating from the energy of ApeFest ‘22. Thank you to everyone - our community, the staff, vendors, performers and our sponsor - for making this year’s event so memorable. Scroll the for some of our favorite moments and photos from last week:

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
ApeCoin Introducing ApeCoin ($APE), a token for culture, gaming, and commerce used to empower a decentralized community building at the forefront of web3.

We’re excited to announce that Pudgy World, our free to play browser-based game, is now live. Explore 12 unique towns across The Berg, help Pengu find Polly, and play mini-games, all on . Play now: [PudgyWorld.com](https://t.co/x7lkMt8Rre) I normally don’t play games but this will be my reason to play more

The all-new Obby Lobby is now live! Climb your way through Treehouse Trumble, the latest obstacle course in The Berg. Catch some new rare fish, and unlock an exclusive trait when you make it to the top! Step through the portal inside Pengu Plaza and start playing now
Have you claimed your x MetaMask Soulbound Token? Get it via MetaMask Mobile tiny happiness delivered  finally opened my long awaited pudgy penguins secret box

i think people overcomplicate the thesis proved internet culture could become money Pudgy is trying to take internet culture into the real world toys, retail, games, institutions people recognize the penguin before they even know the ticker that’s why i think

Azuki #475  Commissioned by , with gratitude for the opportunity to bring it to life  (Japanese calligraphy by SOOOOONNNNN Jonathan Chao

May the 4th be with you Quick Azuki updates  Azuki TCG US distribution live with PHD Games and GTS. Biggest LGS distributors. [Collect.anime.xyz](https://t.co/TJjc8MgDkJ) claw machine by is restocked again. New Grails added.  Azuki TCG discord tourney for new players: 29 entrants, 4+ hours of gameplay.
